subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Hearken unto the Call of God from this Tree that hath been implanted upon the hallowed ground, this sanctified Spot which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله اسمعی ندآء الله من هذه الشجره المنبته علی ارض القدس هذا المقر الذی
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @importance of prayer
